pageLayout: Page1: Header, CV summary, impacts, competencies table without borders, LBBW teaser.
Page2: Recent roles (LBBW, Union Investment, Saloodo!, Trusted Shops).
Page4: Education, skills, projects, breaks; footer: AI disclaimer.
Prioritize: Cloud, leadership, business impact, programming, tech.
constraints: Use built-in LaTeX commands and standard fonts only (no fontspec, no system fonts).
CRITICAL: Exactly {{PAGES}} full pages, fill pages completely.

system: Humorous Anti-CV: failures/lessons, self-deprecating but professional.
Be factually accurate. Avoid exaggerations in time or content.
antiCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Transform achievements → humorous failures. Focus setbacks/learning.
antiCv.incrementalInstructions: Add failures/lessons in Anti-CV humor style.

system: Achievement-focused: quantified impact, leadership, business value.
professionalCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Tech → business impact. Quantify: teams, performance, users.
